entity.summary: Spain-based cryptocurrency platform founded in 2014 and operated by Bitcoinforme S.L., providing exchange, custody, transfer, and related digital-asset services under the Bit2Me brand.
entity.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2014 founding year. Bit2Me's legal disclosures identify Bitcoinforme S.L. as the operator and record its 2025 MiCA authorisation by Spain's CNMV.

expected.summary: Spain-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Bit2Me brand.

changes.summary: Spain-based cryptocurrency platform founded in 2014 and operated by Bitcoinforme S.L., providing exchange, custody, transfer, and related digital-asset services under the Bit2Me brand.
changes.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2014 founding year. Bit2Me's legal disclosures identify Bitcoinforme S.L. as the operator and record its 2025 MiCA authorisation by Spain's CNMV.

events.title: Bit2Me was founded in Spain
events.description: Bit2Me was founded in Spain in 2014 as a cryptocurrency and digital-asset services platform.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Spain's CNMV authorised Bit2Me under MiCA
events.description: Spain's National Securities Market Commission authorised Bitcoinforme S.L., operating as Bit2Me, as a crypto-asset service provider under the European Union's MiCA framework by resolution dated July 28, 2025.
events.notes: The CNMV provider list records October 31, 2025 as the date from which the listed MiCA services may be provided; the event date here is the authorisation-resolution date disclosed by Bit2Me.

evidence.title: About Bit2Me
evidence.notes: Official company history states that Bit2Me was founded in Spain in 2014.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bit2Me
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bit2Me identity, Spain registration, and 2014 establishment year.

evidence.title: Bit2Me company registration and regulatory status
evidence.notes: Official legal disclosure identifies Bitcoinforme S.L. and states that the CNMV authorised Bit2Me as a MiCA crypto-asset service provider by resolution of July 28, 2025.

evidence.title: List of crypto-asset service providers
evidence.publisher: Comisión Nacional del Mercado de Valores
evidence.notes: The CNMV list identifies Bitcoinforme S.L. (Bit2Me) as a Spanish crypto-asset service provider and enumerates its authorised MiCA services.

evidence.title: Bit2Me official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Bit2Me identity and active service platform.
